name: Chocolate Chip Toffee Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 cups semi-sweet chocolate chips, divided (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9 inch pan.
3. Mix together the flour and brown sugar. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add the egg and mix well.
5. Add half the chocolate chips and nuts, mixing thoroughly.
6. Reserve 1 1/2 cups of this mixture. Press the remaining crumbs into the pan.
7. Bake for 10 minutes.
8. Pour the sweetened condensed milk evenly over the crumbs.
9. Sprinkle the reserved crumb mixture with the remaining toffee bits.
10. Return to oven and bake an additional 25 to 30 minutes, or until set.
11. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
Notes: The center may still be slightly unset after baking for 35-40 minutes. These bars are best enjoyed firm the next day due to their rich butter, toffee, and condensed milk content. Enjoy with caution regarding dietary concerns.
